financial.note: High interest rate sensitivity due to expansion-driven debt; KBANK (via Kasikorn Securities) also serves as a key financial advisor.
Provides significant revolving credit and term loans for large-scale warehouse inventory and logistics infrastructure.

supply_chain.note: DOHOME is a major distributor of structural steel and roofing; BlueScope is a critical supplier for high-volume metal products.
Raw material costs for basic construction products; rising cement prices can squeeze retail margins if not fully passed to customers.
Key partner for the 'Repair & Decor' segment; sales are highly correlated with home improvement and renovation cycles.

equity_cross_holdings.note: In-house logistics arm critical for the 'Complete, Cheap, Good' distribution model across regional branches.

competitors.note: Direct rival in the 'Warehouse' format; share price often moves inversely due to sector rotation or regional price wars.
Competes in the home decoration segment, though HMPRO targets a more premium urban demographic.
Intense competition in the industrial and contractor supply segments.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: As a major steel trader, rising prices increase inventory valuation and top-line revenue, though they can dampen project demand.
Impacts the cost of financing high D/E ratios (1.6x) and reduces consumer mortgage/renovation loan affordability.
Directly drives 'Togo' branch sales and retail decoration segment; high household debt in 2026 remains a headwind.
